emails.subject: Thank You
emails.body: Thank You Thanks to each of you for your help Monday night. The Information Session was a success! We had over 100 interested students attend, and I believe that each one was able to ask questions and speak to an Enron representative. The dinner afterwards was also quite a success. We were able to spend time with 19 of our full-time candidates...congratulating those who have accepted, and convincing those who have not yet signed. It, too, was quite successful as I had 2 additional acceptances the following morning from Geiv Dubash and Daniel Jenkins. Thanks again! lexi

emails.subject: Re: Thank You
emails.body: FYI sounds as if Michelle is accepting. Do you have anything firm from her? --Sally Forwarded by Sally Beck/HOU/ECT on 03/27/2001 10:20 AM Enron North America Corp. From: Sally Beck 03/26/2001 09:29 AM
